description.en:
Combined personal tweaks: - No Speed Limit: tools usable at any speed, top speed x2, cruise cap 200 km/h - Max Capacity: Wilson Pacesetter / Krampe SKS / Bergmann HTW 65 / Krone GX (940,000 l), Krone TX/ZX, Rapide 8400W (940,000 l), ABI 1600 / TDK 301 RA+RP (60,000 l) - Max Horsepower: JD 9RX + 9R, Case IH Steiger, CLAAS XERION 12, Volvo VNX 300, Mack Anthem 6x4 (1156 hp)
All config in scripts/MichalsInGameMods.lua.
